chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6241 of 2024 (M/s. Sustainable Economic and Agriculture Development Foundation & another Vs. Government of Sindh & others) Date Order with signature of Judge Priority 1. For order on office objection No.32. 2. For order on CMA No.28215/2024 (Exemption). 3. For order on CMA No.28216/2024 (Stay). 4. For hearing of main case..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-. Dated 14.01.2025 Mr. Sajid Ali Gorar, Advocate for the petitioners a/w Mr. Ghulam Shabir Memon, President of petitioner No.1 and Mr. Asif Hussain, Admin Officer of petitioner No.2. Mr. Muhammad Lateefuddin Pasha, Advocate for respondent No.2. Mr. Naeem Akhtar Talpar, Addl. A.G. Sindh a/w Mr. Qamar Zaman Shah, Assistant Director (Legal) SPPRA. ************* Learned counsel for the petitioners files statements to withdraw this petition. In view of the statements filed by learned counsel for the petitioners, this petition is dismissed as withdrawn alongwith listed applications. CHIEF JUSTICE JUDGE Asif
